persona_categories.name: Content Creators
persona_categories.description: Individuals who create content as a primary or side activity

persona_categories.name: Business Owners
persona_categories.description: Small business owners and entrepreneurs looking to grow through content

personas.name: The Aspiring Creator
personas.description: 20-something just starting their YouTube or Instagram journey. Has ideas but struggles with consistency and strategy. Wants to go full-time but can't yet justify leaving their day job.

psychographics.desires: Financial freedom through content, a loyal audience, creative fulfillment
psychographics.requirements: Affordable tools, proven frameworks, quick wins to stay motivated
psychographics.emotional_triggers: Seeing peers succeed, FOMO on trending topics, frustration with slow growth
psychographics.motivations: Creative expression, building a personal brand, escaping 9-to-5
psychographics.fears: Wasting time on the wrong strategy, never getting enough views, looking unprofessional

personas.notes: Key segment for TOFU content. Responds well to relatable, story-driven hooks.

personas.name: The Busy Marketer
personas.description: Marketing manager or solo marketer at a growing company. Stretched thin across channels. Needs to produce more content with fewer resources, without sacrificing quality.

psychographics.desires: Scalable content workflows, impressive reporting metrics, career advancement
psychographics.requirements: Team collaboration features, analytics integration, brand consistency tools
psychographics.emotional_triggers: Pressure from leadership, competitor success, content deadline anxiety
psychographics.motivations: Professional growth, proving ROI, efficiency gains
psychographics.fears: Falling behind competitors, producing low-performing content, budget cuts

personas.notes: Key segment for MOFU/BOFU. Responds to data, case studies, ROI claims.

personas.name: The Side Hustler
personas.description: Working professional with a creative side project. Creates content on weekends and evenings. Needs maximum output from minimal time investment.

psychographics.desires: Build passive income stream, eventually transition to full-time creator
psychographics.requirements: Time-saving automation, mobile-friendly, batch content creation
psychographics.emotional_triggers: Jealousy of full-time creators, burnout from juggling two roles
psychographics.motivations: Financial independence, creative outlet, building something of their own
psychographics.fears: Burnout, never having enough time, audience not caring
psychographics.values: Time efficiency, work-life balance, smart shortcuts

personas.notes: Responds well to 'time-saving' and 'batch creation' messaging.

pain_points.pain_point: Spending hours creating content that gets barely any views or engagement
pain_points.solution: AI-powered content analysis predicts what topics and formats will perform, so you invest time in content that actually works

pain_points.pain_point: No clear content strategy — posting randomly without a plan
pain_points.solution: ContentGrow's campaign planner organizes ideas into strategic funnels with clear goals for each piece of content

pain_points.pain_point: Can't produce enough content to stay consistent across all channels
pain_points.solution: Batch creation tools let you plan a month of content in one session, with AI-assisted variations for each platform

pain_points.pain_point: Limited marketing budget with pressure to show ROI on every piece of content
pain_points.solution: Performance prediction helps allocate budget to high-potential content, maximizing returns before spending on production

pain_points.pain_point: Only 5-10 hours per week for content — can't afford to waste any of it
pain_points.solution: AI-powered workflows compress research, writing, and scheduling into 2-hour batch sessions that cover an entire week

messages.title: Time Freedom Angle
messages.body: You didn't start creating to spend all day optimizing. Stop trading hours for views — let AI handle the strategy so you can focus on what you love: making great content.
messages.delivery_notes: Conversational, slightly frustrated opening that shifts to hopeful. Speak like a friend who just discovered a shortcut.

hooks.text: I wasted 3 months posting content nobody watched
What if your next video could 10x your reach?

messages.notes: Works best with Aspiring Creator and Side Hustler personas.

messages.title: Social Proof / Results
messages.body: 10,000 creators grew their audience 3x faster using ContentGrow. The difference? They stopped guessing and started using data to drive every content decision.
messages.delivery_notes: Confident, authoritative tone. Lead with specific numbers. Use testimonial-style delivery for video.

hooks.text: They told me AI couldn't replace a content strategist

messages.notes: Best for retargeting warm audiences. Pair with Busy Marketer persona.

messages.title: Cost vs. Value Reframe
messages.body: An agency charges ₹50K/month for a content strategy. ContentGrow gives you the same AI-powered planning for less than a coffee a day. Your content deserves a strategy — your wallet deserves a break.
messages.delivery_notes: Direct, numbers-first approach. Use split-screen visual: agency cost vs. ContentGrow cost. End with urgency.

hooks.text: I was paying ₹50K/month for what this tool does for ₹500
Your content strategy shouldn't cost more than your rent

messages.notes: Conversion-focused. Best paired with Side Hustler and Busy Marketer.

messages.title: Fear of Missing Out
messages.body: While you're still guessing what to post, your competitors are using AI to plan content that actually converts. Every day without a strategy is a day your audience grows somewhere else.
messages.delivery_notes: Urgent, slightly provocative. Build tension in first half, offer relief in second. Works great as Reel with quick cuts.

hooks.text: Your competitor just planned next month's content in 2 hours
Why are some creators growing 10x faster than you?

messages.notes: High-energy delivery. Pair with Aspiring Creator for max impact.

styles.name: Friendly & Relatable
styles.description: Warm, approachable tone like talking to a knowledgeable friend. Uses casual language, personal anecdotes, and 'we' framing. Avoids corporate jargon.

styles.name: Bold & Authoritative
styles.description: Confident, data-backed assertions. Short punchy sentences. Uses numbers and specific claims. Positions brand as the expert. Slightly provocative edge.

styles.name: Urgent & Direct
styles.description: High-energy, action-oriented. Creates FOMO without being manipulative. Uses countdown language, 'right now' framing, and clear CTAs. Fast pacing for video.

visual_formats.name: Talking Head Studio
visual_formats.description: Clean indoor setup with professional lighting. Talent speaks directly to camera. Subtle branded background or color-matched wall. Trust-building format.

visual_formats.name: UGC Phone Style
visual_formats.description: Selfie-camera, casual setting (home office, coffee shop). Feels authentic and unscripted. Low production value is intentional — builds trust with younger audiences.

visual_formats.name: Motion Graphics Explainer
visual_formats.description: Animated infographic style with brand colors. Text animations, icon transitions, data visualizations. Works great for stats-heavy messages. No talent needed.

recipes.title: The Aspiring Creator × Time Freedom × Friendly × Talking Head

content.ad_copy:
I wasted 3 months posting content nobody watched.

Then I discovered that content strategy isn't about posting more — it's about posting smarter. ContentGrow's AI analyzed my niche and told me exactly what my audience wanted to see.

Within 2 weeks, my views tripled. Not because I worked harder, but because every piece of content had a purpose.

Stop guessing. Start growing.
content.headline: Stop Guessing. Start Growing.
content.description: AI-powered content strategy for creators who are tired of posting into the void.

variants.text: What if every video you made actually got views? That's not a dream — that's what happens when AI plans your content strategy.
variants.label: Variant A: Dream opener

content.notes: Test both story hook and question hook in A/B

video.concept: Creator sharing their frustration-to-success story with ContentGrow

scenes.name: Hook — Frustration
scenes.description: Talent sitting at desk, frustrated, scrolling through low-view analytics. Dim lighting.

scenes.name: The Problem
scenes.description: Quick cuts of posting content, checking phone, disappointed reactions. Numbers overlay showing low views.

scenes.name: Discovery
scenes.description: Talent discovers ContentGrow. Screen recording of AI suggestions. Lighting brightens.

scenes.name: Results
scenes.description: Analytics going up. Happy reactions. Views counter climbing. Energetic music.

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.description: Talent speaks to camera: 'Try it free for 7 days.' ContentGrow logo + URL overlay.

rows.dialogue: I wasted 3 months posting content nobody watched.
(VO) No views. No engagement. Just wasted hours.
rows.visual: Quick cuts: posting, refreshing analytics, disappointed face

rows.dialogue: Then I found a tool that changed everything.
rows.visual: Talent opens laptop, ContentGrow AI interface visible
Split screen: analytics before/after, celebration reactions

rows.dialogue: Stop guessing. Start growing. Link in bio.
rows.visual: Talent to camera, smile. Logo + URL lower third.
rows.camera: Medium shot, clean background, confident posture
rows.audio: Music resolve, subtle chime on logo

recipes.production_notes: Need talent with authentic creator vibe — not too polished. Shoot in real home office.

recipes.title: The Busy Marketer × Social Proof × Bold × Motion Graphics
The Side Hustler × Cost vs. Value × Urgent × UGC

content.ad_copy:
I was paying ₹50K/month for a content agency. They gave me a spreadsheet and a monthly call.

ContentGrow gives me AI-powered content planning, performance predictions, and a full month's strategy — for less than a coffee a day.

If you're still paying agency prices for basic strategy, you need to see this.
content.headline: Agency Strategy. Coffee Budget.

video.concept: Creator comparing agency cost vs ContentGrow in casual selfie style

scenes.name: Cost Shock
scenes.description: Creator holds phone showing ₹50K invoice. Shocked face.

scenes.name: The Switch
scenes.description: Creator opens ContentGrow app. Quick tour of features. Text: 'Same strategy, 100x cheaper'

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.description: Creator to camera: 'Link in bio, seriously.' Casual, genuine delivery.

recipes.production_notes: UGC talent — real creator, not actor. Must feel authentic.

recipes.title: The Aspiring Creator × FOMO × Bold × UGC
The Busy Marketer × Time Freedom × Friendly × Talking Head
The Side Hustler × FOMO × Urgent × Motion Graphics

content.ad_copy:
Your competitor just planned next month's content in 2 hours.

While you're still deciding what to post, they're using AI to build a content strategy that converts. ContentGrow gives side hustlers the same planning power as agencies — without the agency price tag.

Don't let limited time be your excuse. Make it your advantage.
content.headline: Your Competitors Already Started.
content.description: AI content strategy built for creators with limited time.

image_brief.creative_brief: Bold motion graphics with split screen: left side shows chaotic random posting (scattered post-its, confused emoji), right side shows organized ContentGrow calendar with green checkmarks. Brand colors dominate. Big stat overlay: '3x faster growth'. Clean, modern, slightly urgent feel.
image_brief.ai_prompt: Professional motion graphics style infographic, split screen comparison, left side chaos right side organized, blue and orange brand colors, clean modern corporate design, bold typography, data visualization, 1080x1080

prompt_params.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, text errors, cluttered

recipes.review_notes: Approved by creative director. Ready for production.
recipes.production_notes: Motion graphics team to handle. Use brand color palette. Animate the split screen transition at 0:08.

campaigns.name: Q2 Lead Generation
campaigns.description: Spring campaign targeting new creators and marketers. Goal: 500 trial signups from Meta Ads. Mix of TOFU awareness and BOFU conversion creative.
campaigns.target_audience_notes: Primary: Aspiring creators 22-30. Secondary: Busy marketers 28-40.
campaigns.notes: Phase 1: TOFU (April). Phase 2: Retargeting (May). Phase 3: Conversion push (June).
campaigns.ai_instructions: Focus on the transformation story — show before/after of content creation workflow. Emphasize time savings and professional output quality. Avoid mentioning competitors by name.
campaigns.brief: Q2 campaign targeting emerging creators and busy marketers who struggle with content creation. The campaign will demonstrate how ContentGrow AI transforms the content workflow from hours to minutes. Phase 1 builds awareness through relatable pain-point stories. Phase 2 delivers social proof and feature demos. Phase 3 drives conversions with urgency and risk-reversal.

campaigns.name: Retargeting — Warm Audience
campaigns.description: Retarget website visitors and trial dropoffs with social proof and value messaging.
campaigns.target_audience_notes: Website visitors, trial users who didn't convert, engaged social followers.
campaigns.ai_instructions: These users have already visited our site. Use specific feature references and case study data. Higher urgency tone is appropriate. Include limited-time offer messaging.
campaigns.brief: Retargeting campaign for warm audiences who visited our pricing page or started a trial but didn't convert. Use authoritative tone with specific data points. Focus on removing objections and creating urgency.

tags.name: Urgent
tags.description: High priority items needing immediate attention
